symptoms.symptom_name: Continuous convulsions >5-10 minutes without regaining consciousness

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Defining feature by duration and lack of recovery.

symptoms.symptom_name: Cyanosis and irregular breathing during seizure

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reflects hypoxia from sustained muscular contraction and secretions.

symptoms.symptom_name: Dilated unreactive pupils, severe tachycardia, hyperthermia

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Clinician-only findings sealed from telehealth chat.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Continuous convulsions with cyanosis confirm a maximal-urgency neurological/respiratory emergency.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Immediate 000 dispatch for rescue benzodiazepine administration and airway management
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Time-critical; every additional minute of uncontrolled seizure risks permanent brain injury.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Continuous EEG and arterial blood gas (in hospital)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms ongoing epileptiform activity and metabolic derangement, but should not delay emergency dispatch.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Waiting at home to see if the seizure resolves spontaneously
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Would dangerously delay life-saving emergency treatment.
